newsitems.title: Demo released!
newsitems.author: Voskip
newsitems.contents: The demo for Your Painting, Sir has been released!In this demo, you will be able to play the first chapter of the game, and we give you a teaser for the second chapter.We're very excited for you to try out our game. Besides completing the demo, we also hope you have a lot of fun messing around in creative mode. We certainly do.
